summary: DHH announces the release of Rails 0.10.0, describing it as a major upgrade on the path to version 1.0. The release highlights four key features: Routing, Web Services, Components, and Oracle support. He encourages developers to try Ruby on Rails, framing it as the best time to get started.
key_points: Rails 0.10.0 represents a significant milestone toward the 1.0 release
Key features include Routing, Web Services, Components, and Oracle support
DHH positions the release as a call to action for developers who haven't yet adopted Rails
money_quotes: It's a huge upgrade and a big step on the road to 1.0.
It has never been a better time to get your Ruby on Rails.
key_insight: Rails 0.10.0 marked a pivotal milestone in the framework's early development, signaling its growing maturity with enterprise features like Oracle support and web services.
